---
title: "Two organism simulation using Novor results: SimID xx-xx"
author: "Your Name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_notebook:
    df_print: paged
    toc: yes
    toc_float: yes
    toc_depth: 2
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(plyr)
library(reshape2)
library(assertthat)
library(ggplot2)
library(MakeSearchSim)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


# Reproducibility Information
Making simulated peptide lists by mixing Novor results of a contributor and primary dataset. 

Using below version of MakeSearchSim
```{r}
packageVersion("MakeSearchSim")
```

Using below version of R. Version 3.6.0 introduced a significant change to how random numbers are generated. (see ?selectScans for details). Keep track of what version of R was used when generating simulations. 
```{r}
getRversion()
```

Below is the current RNG state

```{r}
RNGkind()
```

Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```



# Generating Novor results
Skip to "Importing Novor Results" if you've already run Novor.

#### mzML to MGF conversion
```{r}
mzMLFiles <- list.files(pattern = "*.mzML", full.names = TRUE)

msConvert_config <- system.file("extdata", "convertMGF_config.txt", package = "MakeSearchSim", mustWork = TRUE)

mgfFiles <- lapply(mzMLFiles, mzMLtoMGF, configFile = msConvert_config)
```

## Running Novor
Use NovorParams_fTol002_pTol15_MetOx_Alk_Novor_params.txt for alkylated datasets
```{r}
novor_config <- system.file("extdata", "NovorParams_fTol002_pTol15_MetOx_noAlk_Novor_params.txt", package = "MakeSearchSim", mustWork = TRUE)

#choosing path to Novor .bat file
path_to_novor <- choose.files()

novorResFiles <- sapply(mgfFiles, runNovor, NovorParams = novor_config, Novor_Path = path_to_novor)
```


# Importing Novor Results

```{r}
novorResFiles <- list.files(pattern = "*._Novor.csv")
mgfFiles <- list.files(pattern = "*.mgf")

#making a dataframe of result csv's and corrispoinding MGF files
inputDF <- cbind.data.frame(NovorOutputFile = novorResFiles, MGF_file = unlist(mgfFiles), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

#running importSingleNovor
RawNovor <- mdply(inputDF, importSingleNovor)
RawNovor$MGFDataset <- factor(RawNovor$MGFDataset)

#spliting into a list of dataframes by MGFDataset
RawNovorList <- split(RawNovor, RawNovor$MGFDataset)
```

# Selecting contributor scans
Load MSGF+ results and SimRecipes table
```{r}
#MSGF+ results

#SimRecipes table

```

Adding column for simulated dataset name

```{r}
SimRecipes$SimDataset <- paste0(substr(SimRecipes$PrimaryOrganism,1,6),
                                '_',substr(SimRecipes$ContributorOrganism,1,6),
                        '_Nprot',SimRecipes$TargetNumContributorProteins,
                        '_Npep',SimRecipes$TargetContributorPep_per_Prot,
                                '_SimID',SimRecipes$SimID)
```

## Running BatchSelectScans
**add dbResults object**
**add rng_version**
Verify you want to use the default RNG state for the currently installed version of R. See ?selectScans for more details. 
```{r}
dataTracker <- ddply(SimRecipes, .(SimID), BatchSelectScans, dbResults =, rng_version = "R_version_default")
```

# Mix Novor results

## Small set workflow

### Running BatchMixNovor

```{r}
allmixedNovor <- ddply(dataTracker, .(SimID), BatchMixNovor, NovorResultList = RawNovorList)
```

#### Check for missing contributor scans
This happends when a scan selected using the MSGF+ results doesn't have a Novor PSM. 
```{r}
summary(factor(allmixedNovor$OriginDataset))
```

```{r}
unique(dataTracker[,c("ContributorDataset", "NumContributorScans")])
```



#### Make hexbin plot
Plotting overall precursor error by Novor score. Graph object will be really big so delete afterwards.
```{r}
graph <- plotNovorHexBin(allmixedNovor)
graph <- graph + geom_hline(yintercept = 70)
plot(graph)
```

Graph object will be really big so deleting afterwards
```{r}
rm(graph)
```


### Filtering Novor results
Below are default parameters
```{r}
filtmixedNovor <- filterNovor(allmixedNovor,ppmErrorMin = -15, ppmErrorMax = 15,minLength = 6,minNovorScore = 70)
```

### Digesting peptides and writing output files

```{r}
digestPepCounts <- ddply(filtmixedNovor, .(SimID), makePepFile, datasetCol = "SimDataset", outputFileDir = ".")

#Merging back with dataTracker
dataTracker <- merge(dataTracker, digestPepCounts, by = "SimID")

#Save dataTracker


```

## Large set workflow

```{r}
dataTracker <- ddply(dataTracker, .(SimID), MixFilterDigest, NovorResultList = RawNovorList, outputFileDir = "./PepListFolder")

#save dataTracker


```
